slots.caption_ig:
The anatomy of every dish. Maillard crust. 80/20 grind. Bun-to-patty ratio. We read so you don't. Every dish broken down by what actually makes it great — and what cheaps it out.

#ForkFox #FoodScience #DishNotRestaurant #FoodAnatomy #FoodSmart
slots.caption_fb: What's the difference between a great smash burger and a mid one? It's not vibes. It's Maillard crust temperature. It's the 80/20 fat ratio. It's whether the bun-to-patty ratio holds up after a bite. We scored every dish across these exact dimensions so you can pick by what matters, not by what's loudest.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16 video, 8 seconds. Macro close-up of a smash burger being compressed on a flat-top. Steam, crust forming. Labels pop in at each stage: 'Maillard crust forming', '80/20 grind', 'Bun-to-patty 1:1.2'. End frame: 'The anatomy of every dish.' with 'anatomy' in red.
